menu.desc_1: View my source code and technical projects
menu.desc_5: Let's collaborate on your next project

descripciones.practica-pokedex: Modern web application created with React and TypeScript that consumes the popular PokeAPI and utilizes an advanced UI stack and global state. It features integration with Material UI, drag and drop, React Query, Zustand, and TailwindCSS, providing a smooth, responsive, and highly maintainable interface.
descripciones.custom_todo: Task management application developed with React, TypeScript, and Vite. It includes MUI with Date Pickers, global state with Zustand, advanced routing, and a modern styling system based on TailwindCSS.
descripciones.speedtest-api: Experimental backend developed in TypeScript intended to measure connection speed by running tests against a remote Docker container exposing iperf3. The system automates periodic measurements, stores results in a local database, and exposes endpoints documented with Swagger.
descripciones.services-frontend: Services portal for multiple APIs, developed with React, TypeScript and Vite. The project focuses on integrating MUI for a modern interface, global state management with Zustand, advanced routing and a styling system based on TailwindCSS for a smooth and attractive user experience.
descripciones.JGEST-Boilerplate: Front-End project template developed with React, TypeScript and Vite. The frontend uses MUI for a modern interface, global state management with Zustand, advanced routing and TailwindCSS for styling. It also includes several pre-built functions like API services, hooks and reusable components.
